kernel-v0 corpus authored and validated: 54 kot-ast/1 concepts in data/kernel-v0/ (4 gist walkthroughs incl. non-normative Kind rendering + 50 research-grade; 17 InstanceSchema/16 WhenTrue/21 RelationalSchema; 18 reference-bearing, max ref depth 3, DAG). data/validate.mjs: 54/54 pass all gates + encodeConceptSet at D=8192 (encoder 40e8c8ba). Scope note: 65-prime lexicon already lives in encoder/src/lexicon.ts as data (not re-authored); no molecules minted (profile decision pending); synthetics remain the seeded generator's job. Follow-ups: kernel-of-truth-arq (content-addressed ids), -vjc (profile-1 gaps), -tk9 (prime coverage).

Fixed in 0d21de1 (decoder-only). Root cause: decode-order SNR loss, not encoder capacity — unpeeled adjunct atoms + unpeeled sibling quote clause turned into noise on deep structured-child estimates (deep-chain corr 0.60->0.15), pushing the true atomic filler under the 5-sigma gate, after which the required-slot assumePresent path fabricated a phantom SP. Fix: two-phase atomic-first role sweep in decodeClause, deferred KIND/PART of-resolution in decodeSP, restore-self/peel-siblings refinement in decodeClauseList, and required-slot matched-filter competition (raw unbind scale) in decodeRole. X2 full grid 720/720 exact, pre-registered gate PASS; depth 5-6 also 100% with higher confidence. Encoder content-hash UNCHANGED (40e8c8ba...e2d10c); X0 goldens byte-identical; unit suite 31/31 incl. new regression test.

Pass-gate now met: X2 was the only open criterion (719/720 in the first run). Decoder-only fix in 0d21de1 (see kernel-of-truth-sq2): X2 full grid re-run 720/720 exact, pre-registered '100% at depth<=4' PASS, depth 5-6 documented at 100% with improved mean min-confidence. Encoder unchanged — content-hash 40e8c8ba...e2d10c and X0 goldens byte-identical, so pre-registered X1/X3/X4 results stand. Unit suite 31/31 (new regression test for the depth-4x8 deep quote-chain shape). Full X1 remains tracked in kernel-of-truth-j5z.
Duplicate of kernel-of-truth-sq2 (identical title/scope, double-filed). Fixed in 0d21de1; see sq2 close note.

Mapper v0 built (mapper/, 27/27 tests pass) + both M0 reports produced (mapper/m0/results/). M0a: 17.08% token mass mapped (3.11% concepts, 13.97% primes), 4.79% abstained; provisional precision 0.82 strict / recall 0.89 (0.68 lower bound) — AGENT-JUDGED, PENDING HUMAN ANNOTATION per pre-registration; human sample committed at mapper/m0/annotation-sample.jsonl (follow-up kernel-of-truth-r7i). M0b: 28.4% kernel / 29.8% explicable / 33.0% molecule-needing / 8.9% out-of-scope of top-500 content mass; profile-1 ceiling ~58% of content mass (~26% of all tokens) in the deliberately favourable domain. Most claim-limiting: molecule-gated third of content mass + 11/54 concepts never fire (5 permanently ambiguity-shadowed). Follow-ups: r7i, 82r, 30d, 0zg, ost.

poc/e2 complete: all 7 input artefacts generated for real (kernel RDM full-D + jl512/jl576, 3 baseline RDMs, contexts, freq pools; pins stamped), 12 tests pass, runner mock smoke passes (correct NULL on random embeddings); poc/gpu launch/terminate/deploy-key automation dry-run-validated (DryRunOperation OK, no instance launched). Follow-ups: avt (X3 strata), 7qc (GPU launch), muj (non-English). Pushed cb51c39.

Phase X re-run on the AUTHORED kernel-v0 corpus (54 concepts, encoder 40e8c8ba..., corpus f23f5211...; poc/results/*-kernel-v0-report.* + kernel-v0-phase-x-summary.md, commit cae9af0). X1: SUCCESS — min adversarial single-edit angle 0.002342 rad over 2475 saturation-enumerated neighbours = 11.0x fp16 floor (0.000213 rad; bar >5x); min authored pair afraid<->sad 0.1156 rad — the emotion trio, NOT give/take/gift (repair<->take is rank 4; finding kernel-of-truth-7yp). X2: FAIL — 51/54 exact decode in BOTH minimal and full-corpus cleanup-lexicon conditions; afraid (hard fail, quote-scope referent order), angry+sad (optional SP slots dropped under deep quote+op nesting); all 18 reference-bearing concepts exact (bug kernel-of-truth-0kn). X3: 13/79 meaning-inverting edits closer than the nearest distinct pair; polarity-flip median cos 0.9974 vs meaning-preserving alpha-rename 0.7036; notBoost=4 costs RDM rho 0.939 without touching pred flips — no dominating variant, similarity ban stands (kernel-of-truth-5lh). X4: SUCCESS — RDM Spearman 0.9718 (8192->512) / 0.9706 (8192->576), min R^d margins 0.002252/0.002199 rad = 10.1x/9.9x floor under the pinned jl/8192/{512,576} streams; afraid<->sad remains min pair in R^d. Synthetic x1:full (parallel agent's run) untouched throughout.

X2-corpus re-run PASS: minimal 54/54 AND full-corpus 54/54 exact (was 51/54 both; report x2-kernel-v0-report.md 2026-07-07T04:22Z). Ruling: afraid record LEGAL, validator right (gist §4.2); decoder fixed via residual-completion phase. Encoder content-hash unchanged (40e8c8ba...e2d10c), corpus untouched (hash f23f5211... unchanged, no X1-corpus re-run needed), unit suite 38/38. Follow-ups filed: synthetic-gate re-run/generator coverage (P2), substitution/removal completion (P3).

Content-hashes for coordinator to pin into poc-design.md: Bq/1@512 3492799ed73b49a612bebca920421041edd31d7bd4098bcf55da52df127ab9ee, Bq/1@576 6ad0b2bc01c06447aae8468f500e2a2178e9a40f0d95de048b0418afcaea77db. Decode at native D: 1/54 (512) and 8/54 (576) exact vs 54/54 at 8192 - expected capacity-math finding, ungated, reported (x2-q-report). RDM: native re-encode preserves full-D geometry as well as the JL projection (0.9711/0.9795 vs 0.9718/0.9706); native-vs-JL agreement 0.938/0.948 (x4-q-report).

E1->E4 authored-row continuity, verdict MOCK-labelled. GPU day: launch-e1-pull.sh --with-e4 chains E4 after E1 on one boot (~22-23h, spot ~$10-14).
